category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to Timor-Leste.

title.en: China-to-Timor-Leste EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入东帝汶：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入東帝汶：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China EV charger documentation against Timor-Leste ANE and EDTL interconnection expectations, IEC 61851 safety baseline, IEC 62196 Type 2, UN 38.3 transport obligations, and 220/380 V 50 Hz grid context for project-connected chargers versus China GB/T 18487, GB/T 20234, and GB/T 27930 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与东帝汶ANE、EDTL并网导向要求、IEC 61851安全基线、IEC 62196 Type 2接口方向、UN 38.3运输义务及220/380 V 50 Hz并网场景——对比中国GB/T 18487、GB/T 20234和GB/T 27930基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與東帝汶ANE、EDTL併網導向要求、IEC 61851安全基線、IEC 62196 Type 2介面方向、UN 38.3運輸義務及220/380 V 50 Hz併網場景——對比中國GB/T 18487、GB/T 20234和GB/T 27930基準的差距對照。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Timor-Leste, the practical requirements are a developing-market ANE/EDTL project-assessment path, project-level interconnection checks for any grid-connected deployment, IEC 61851-1 / IEC 61851-23 safety evidence, IEC 62196 Type 2 for IEC-compatible AC systems and CCS2 where DC systems explicitly require it, UN 38.3 export transport evidence for battery systems, and project-specific thermal/communications evidence in warm humid conditions. Timor-Leste is not a standardised retail EV market yet; shipments should be treated as project-bound opportunities tied to named fleets or facilities. Timor-Leste and China are nominally aligned on 220/380 V 50 Hz, so voltage conversion is not the dominant gap, while interoperability and project documentation are.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入东帝汶时，主要要求是以ANE/EDTL项目评估为导向的发展中国家流程、对任何并网场景进行项目级接入审核、IEC 61851-1 / IEC 61851-23安全证据、IEC 62196 Type 2（AC）和项目中明确要求时的CCS2（DC）兼容、UN 38.3电池系统出口运输证据，以及热与通信在温热潮湿环境下的项目化要求。东帝汶尚未形成标准化零售充电市场，出口应当视为绑定具体车队或设施的项目采购。东帝汶与中国名义电压频率一致，因此电压转换不是主要差距，重点在接口和项目文件。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入東帝汶時，主要要求是以ANE/EDTL項目評估為導向的發展中國家流程、對任何併網場景進行項目級接入審核、IEC 61851-1 / IEC 61851-23安全證據、IEC 62196 Type 2（交流）和項目中明確要求時的CCS2（直流）兼容、UN 38.3電池系統出口運輸證據，以及溫熱潮濕環境下熱與通訊的項目化要求。東帝汶尚未形成標準化零售充電市場，出口應視為綁定具名車隊或設施的項目採購。東帝汶與中國名義電壓頻率一致，因此電壓轉換不是主要差距，重點在接口和項目文件。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, ANE route determination, EDTL project-connection approval, electrical-installation design, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, utility operators, and installers should verify current Timor-Leste ANE/EDTL interconnection requirements, IEC evidence scope, and project-owner requirements before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、ANE路径裁定、EDTL项目并网批准、电气安装设计、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、项目运营方和安装方在出货或安装前应核验现行东帝汶ANE/EDTL并网要求、IEC证据范围及项目业主要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、ANE路徑裁定、EDTL項目併網批准、電器安裝設計、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、項目運營方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應核驗現行東帝汶ANE/EDTL並網要求、IEC證據範圍及項目業主要求。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
